offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, missed payment deadlines cause late fees. We send reminders instead of manual tracking in spreadsheets.
problem: Etsy sellers frequently miss payment deadlines, resulting in late fees and lost discounts.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Indie Hackers posts on similar workflows
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools among sellers
try_it: Let users try manual entry of payment terms and deadline tracking
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Short demo video of manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users

automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing payment data
